title: HDUI By aarrigg
description: The Minecraft UI reimagined to be HD.
body:
Have you ever thought that the Minecraft UI needs to be doubled in resolution? Hopefully, I can't hear you but if you said yes, 

# **THIS IS THE THING TO GET BECAUSE THATS WHAT IT DOES!!!**

**Tip: Get a HD font pack because HDUI doesn't have a HD font and probably never will :).**

(yes i know that not all of the ui is HD, i cant find the buttons textures where did they go) And if you said no, then uh go do something else?
